channel.title: Troubleshooting on Bill's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Troubleshooting on Bill's Blog

item.title: Virtual VLAN Segmentation on pfSense — Three Isolated Zones, No Managed Switch
item.description: Building three firewall-isolated network segments — Trusted, IoT, and Guest — entirely in virtual machines, with no managed-switch hardware, and proving the isolation holds.

item.title: Self-Hosted WireGuard Through a Nested Firewall — and the Four-Layer Debug to Make It Work
item.description: I already run Tailscale, but I wanted to build a VPN into my lab from scratch — raw WireGuard on pfSense, reaching it from my phone on mobile data. Getting the tunnel up was the easy part. Then came four separate silent failures, each producing the identical 'won't load' symptom for a completely different reason, at a completely different layer.
